{% if img.exists %} {% set extra_class = img.class or fallback_class or '' %} {% else %} {% with class=(img.class or fallback_class), ratio=(img.ratio or ((img.width or 1200) ~ '; --h: ' ~ (img.height or 630))), label=img.label, size=img.size, arch=(img.fallback.arch if img.fallback else none), sigil=(img.fallback.sigil if img.fallback else none), stamp=(img.fallback.stamp if img.fallback else none) %} {% include "_placeholder.html" %} {% endwith %} {% endif %}
